name: Rhubarb Nut Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Rhubarb, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Combine brown sugar, oil, and beaten egg. In a small bowl mix together buttermilk, baking soda, salt, and vanilla. Add the milk mixture to the sugar mixture alternately with flour, beating well after each addition. Fold in rhubarb and nuts. Pour into 2 greased and floured 8x4x3 inch loaf pans. Mix topping ingredients and sprinkle on top of loaves. Bake for about one hour or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
